queries.question: Which photographers charged 500 and which videographers charged the same price?
queries.sql:
SELECT Photographers.photographerName as name
FROM Photographers
WHERE Photographers.price = 500
UNION
SELECT Videographers.videographerName as name
FROM Videographers
WHERE Videographers.price = 500

queries.question: Show photographers and videographers who charged 500.
queries.sql:
SELECT Photographers.photographerName as name
FROM Photographers
UNION
SELECT Videographers.videographerName as name
FROM Videographers
WHERE Videographers.price = 500
